# RAPath New Zealand

> New Zealand Medical Device Regulation — Medsafe & Medicines Act 1981

Plain-language reference for New Zealand medical device regulation under Medsafe — WAND notification, Sponsor obligations, device classification, adverse event reporting, and the upcoming Medical Products Bill.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Getting Started](https://rapath.org/nz/getting-started/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Market Entry — WAND](https://rapath.org/nz/market-entry/wand-overview)
- [Device Classification](https://rapath.org/nz/device-classification/how-classification-works)
- [Sponsor Obligations](https://rapath.org/nz/sponsor-obligations/what-is-a-sponsor)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/nz/post-market/adverse-event-reporting)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/nz/legislation/medicines-act-1981)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/nz/whats-new/recent-changes)

## Official Sources

- [Medsafe — Medical Devices](https://www.medsafe.govt.nz/regulatory/DevicesNew.asp)
- [Medicines Act 1981](https://www.legislation.govt.nz/act/public/1981/0118/latest/whole.html)
- [WAND Regulations 2003](https://www.legislation.govt.nz/regulation/public/2003/0352/latest/whole.html)
- [NZ Legislation](https://www.legislation.govt.nz)
